name: agent-context-lens-monorepo
description: Explain which repository instructions AI coding agents receive for any file.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent-context-lens/core && npm run build -w @agent-context-lens/web && npm run build -w agent-context-lens
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @agent-context-lens/core && npm run typecheck -w @agent-context-lens/web && npm run typecheck -w agent-context-lens
scripts.inspect:fixture: npm run build && node apps/cli/dist/index.js inspect fixtures/conflicting-rules --file src/auth/login.ts --agent all --json
